notes:
Fails with "GetThreadContext failed" on 415.18 driver, but starts on 415.18.04 driver. After intro logos, only a black screen is shown with music playing, no interaction is possible.
Disabling D3D11 only gives an error message that DirectX 11 isn't installed. Disabling esync or dxkv also only shows a black screen instead of the main menu.
title: MUSYNX
